title: PM Temp Power Delivery And Olares Orchestration Operating Plan
objective: Record Project Miner Temp Power as the first live PM lane pilot, align the PM intake workflow with the late-May or early-June 2026 field start window, clarify the realistic Olares One orchestration role, and add a hard capability-gap and best-tool escalation duty to the delegated authority protocol.
active_role: Delegated Technical Repo Authority / PM Runtime Product Coordinator / Olares Orchestration Coordinator
orchestration_inputs: The user confirmed Project Miner Temp Power is the definitive target lane and starts in a couple weeks from 2026-05-15.
The user clarified the intended Olares One value: reduce AI-to-AI relay friction and avoid making the stakeholder the message bus.

The user explicitly required Codex, as delegated technical authority, to surface known tool, MCP, connector, host, credential, or validation limitations instead of operating normally with hidden constraints.

Repo authority shows Olares One currently provides a durable host mirror, private-mesh operating posture, host parity checks, and operator-on-demand MCP trio, but does not admit autonomous ai_tasks ownership or broader orchestration services.
PM Lanes 028 through 030 established the Temp Power source lineage and historical import workflow needed for the next import-candidate review lane.
constrained_outputs: Add an active Temp Power delivery and orchestration operating plan under docs/operations.
Update the delegated authority protocol with a capability-gap and best-tool duty.
Clarify that Olares One is currently a relay and validation accelerator through packets, handoffs, host parity, and repo-visible evidence, not an admitted autonomous AI task bus.
Update the Project Miner intake workflow with the Temp Power delivery target and current priority order.
Name PM Lane 031 follow-on recommendation as Temp Power Import Candidate Review, read-only and no Supabase write.
Record known current gaps: hosted Render parity, no admitted durable AI queue, no admitted import mutation, Excel MCP not production runtime, and no unattended workbook macro path.
not_allowed: No Excel MCP production runtime dependency.
handoff_target: Delegated Technical Repo Authority / PM Runtime Product Coordinator
sql_permission_note: Packet 2026-05-15-pm-lane-031 does not authorize SQL writes, schema migration, live data mutation, seed replay into Supabase, production import, workbook writeback, macro execution, Render deployment, Vercel promotion, auth widening, ingress widening, package dependency addition, Excel MCP runtime dependency, durable AI queue admission, ai_tasks ownership, Dataverse import reopening, schedule mutation, assignment mutation, status mutation, AI helper mutation, AI service admission widening, or autonomous AI business-state mutation.
